title: stellaria palustris var. heterophylla
intro: Stellaria palustris var. heterophylla, also known as marsh starflower or bog starflower, is a plant species of the Caryophyllaceae family, characterized by its white, star-shaped flowers and various leaf forms. The medicinal properties of marsh starflower include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Marsh starflower can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
